freeBlocks.headline: Your life keeps asking you to master visibility, leadership, confidence, and creative authority through wisdom, guidance, and principled growth.
freeBlocks.prediction: The deeper pattern is that responsibility, desire, and turning points will repeatedly push you back toward visibility, leadership, confidence, and creative authority. When you avoid that lane, life can feel scattered; when you accept it, your decisions become cleaner and your confidence becomes less dependent on applause.
freeBlocks.title: Soul Planet Reading

freeBlocks.headline: Your work grows when harmony, value, refinement, and relationship intelligence is made visible and useful.
freeBlocks.prediction: Career momentum is likely to improve when you stop scattering your authority and make one visible lane stronger. The Arudha signal through Taurus suggests people notice the version of you that carries stability, value, patience, and material steadiness clearly. If work feels slow, the correction is not panic; it is sharper positioning and more consistent proof of competence.
freeBlocks.title: Career Dharma Reading

freeBlocks.headline: Relationships mirror your unfinished lesson around clear thinking, skill, language, and adaptability.
freeBlocks.prediction: The repeating relationship pattern is not random: partners and close mirrors are likely to bring out the exact place where you must mature your expectations, boundaries, and emotional honesty. Upapada in Taurus adds a partnership lens of stability, value, patience, and material steadiness. When this pattern is handled consciously, relationships become a refinement path rather than a battlefield.
freeBlocks.title: Relationship Mirror Reading

freeBlocks.headline: People are likely to notice you through Taurus qualities first.
freeBlocks.prediction: Your visible identity improves when your work, language, and decisions consistently project stability, value, patience, and material steadiness. This does not mean pretending; it means making the part of you that others already sense more deliberate, polished, and easier to trust.
freeBlocks.title: Visible Identity Reading

freeBlocks.headline: Your current destiny chapter is asking for belief, teaching, higher direction, and principled expansion.
freeBlocks.prediction: The active period is likely to make Sagittarius matters louder: identity, decisions, relationships, and work choices will keep circling back to that theme until it is handled with more maturity. Treat it as a timing chapter that shows where life is pressing for a cleaner response.
freeBlocks.title: Current Destiny Chapter

freeBlocks.headline: Focus now on making belief, teaching, higher direction, and principled expansion real in daily decisions.
freeBlocks.prediction: The chart is not asking you to chase every possibility. It is asking you to make the current signal concrete: fewer vague intentions, more visible commitment, and a cleaner standard for what deserves your time.
freeBlocks.title: What to Focus on Now

guardrails: Start with prediction and guidance before technical evidence.
Do not teach Jaimini as a classroom in the main reading.
Do not guarantee fate, marriage, money, career, health, legal, or death outcomes.
Use only calculated Jaimini evidence supplied by composeJaiminiPlan.
Keep technical evidence in detail drawers, proof sections, or appendices.

summary: Your life keeps asking you to master visibility, leadership, confidence, and creative authority through wisdom, guidance, and principled growth. Choose the steadier expression of wisdom, guidance, and principled growth this season. The lesson is not to become someone else; it is to mature the part of you that already keeps returning through Leo.
